from collections import Counter


def most_frequent_word(words):
    counter = Counter(words)
    top = counter.most_common()[0]
    return top[0]


def get_top_error(errors):
    counts = Counter(errors)
    most_common = counts.most_common()
    return most_common[0][0]


def find_dominant_color(pixels):
    color_counts = Counter(pixels)
    all_items = color_counts.most_common()
    return all_items[0][0]


def get_popular_tag(tags):
    tag_counts = Counter(tags)
    top_tags = tag_counts.most_common()
    return top_tags[0][0]
